2 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
The information contained in this summary has been compiled by Alex Béland from sources believed to be reliable, but no representation or
warranty, express or implied is made to its accuracy, completeness or correctness. All opinions and estimates contained in this summary are
judgments as of the date of this summary, are subject to change without notice and are provided in good faith but without legal responsibility.
This summary is not an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any securities. Past performance is not a guide to future performance,
future returns are not guaranteed, and a loss of original capital may occur. Every province in Canada, state in the U.S. and most countries
throughout the world have their own laws regulating the types of securities and other investment products which may be offered to their
residents, as well as the process for doing so. As a result, any securities discussed in this summary may not be eligible for sale in some
jurisdictions. This summary is not, and under no circumstances should be construed as, a solicitation to act as a securities broker or dealer in
any jurisdiction by any person or company that is not legally permitted to carry on the business of a securities broker or dealer in that
jurisdiction. Nothing in this summary constitutes legal, accounting or tax advice or individually tailored investment advice.
The services contained in this summary may not be suitable for you and it is recommended that you consult an independent third-party
advisor if you are in doubt about the suitability of such services.
Compiled by Alex Béland www.getwsodownload.com

4 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
In 2012, All Financial Advisors are Being Forced to Evolve.
Why? It is the dawn of the
technology-assisted wealth advisor.
Other types of advisors can’t offer the same kind
of financial returns and risk controls.
In fact, if you have money, want money, or manage a portfolio,
your next advisor
will be an expert in the new
wealth management technologies.
This deck is an introduction to the technology-assisted wealth management advisor.
the BIG IDEAwww.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 16 --

5 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
But forget about these specific challenges for a
moment (there will always be global shifts, weak
economies, and sector volatility).
Allow me to focus your attention to a bigger story:
The fundamentals of managing money have changed.
How?
The global collapse of 2008 presented a pivotal
moment for big banks.
In order to compete, they were forced to create
killer new technology, like the unified managed
account A+ platform from RBC Dominion Securities
and the Architect program from wealth management
firm BMO Nesbitt Burns.
REPORTING
MARKET
DATA INVESTORS
OPEN ARCHITECTURE 	BALANCING
Massive amounts of
financial data are available
every hour.
Investors need access to
money managers focused
solely on one sector, able
to read, interpret and
make timely decisions
based on market data.
New Technology for 2012: Overlay portfolio management and
unified managed accounts give you high-level control of your
investments through central reporting, open architecture, and
automatic balancing across your entire portfolio.
NEW TECHNOLOGIES WILL MAKE 2012 EASIER TO MANAGE
NEW
TECHNOLOGY
the PROBLEMS of 2012
WE KNOW 2011 WAS THE YEAR OF DANGEROUS LIVING. And if your gut tells
you that 2012 will only be a slight improvement ... you’re probably right.
THE THEMES FOR 2012 are obvious: First, the U.S. economy is forecast to grow just 2%. Second, the Eurozone economy is
contracting. Lastly, that sound you hear of a global slowdown? It’s from credit-crunching in the Chinese economy.
www.getwsodownload.com

exposure to global equities and below-benchmark exposure to
fixed income. 	- Alex Béland

7 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
ALEX: “Any number of good advisors will help you get on the A+ platform. And it’s important to
recognize, A+ is not the only technology assisted account management program available.
The lesson from the emergence of these technolgies is that the industry has shifted. It’s essen-
tial to have the BMO or RBC technology platform in order to have the best risk management and
capital appreciation available.”
One of the best of these new technologies is the next generation of RBC
Dominion Securities – Unified Management Account technology.
This technology, referred to at RBC as “A+,” is essential for investors who are
dissatisfied with the slow reaction of their portfolios to volatility, investors who
always feel one step behind the market. Unlike traditional wealth management
programs, A+ provides:
IF YOU WANT tremendous risk control, automated tax balancing, and
access to the best analysts in the country — you don’t need me.
Just familiarize yourself with any one of the new wealth management
technologies in the market.
ACCESS
TAX
EFFICIENT
CONTROL
RISK
platform
A Unified Managed Account, or a UMA, is a discretionary
account structure that allows clients to hold individual
equities, fixed income, mutual funds, ETFs and more all
within a single account. The entire portfolio will be rebal-
anced by the portfolio manager, keeping the initial alloca-
tion intact. The ability to manage multiple investment
types in a single account enables optimization to occur at
both the individual investment manager level and at the
portfolio level.
TECHNOLOGY SPECIALIST AND INVESTMENT ADVISOR - RBC DOMINION SECURITIES
introducing 	ALEX BELAND
• Real-time portfolio balancing and tax balancing
• Access to the financing models of the highest performing analysts in the country
• Unified reporting across an entire portfolio, with a single point of access
• Comprehensive optimization across the portfolio, versus optimizing individual vehicles
• Access to the world’s leading institutional money managers
www.getwsodownload.com

8 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
Alex gives you access to RBC’s A+ technology, which is known as the best
portfolio investment technology in the world. This technology gives you two
major benefits.
First, you get the sophisticated risk controls of a big firm.
Second, you get a single control panel, called UMA, to view all your accounts at
the same time.
And unlike investment advisors at other firms, Alex provides the kind of
personalized service only available at small, boutique firms.
A Unified Managed Account, or a UMA,
is a discretionary account structure
that allows you to hold individual
equities & fixed income, mutual funds,
ETFs and more within a single account.
The ability to manage multiple
investment types in a single account
enables optimization to occur at both
the individual investment manager level
and at the portfolio level, taking into
account your investment objectives
and desire for downside protection. You
also get access to the current thinking
of RBC’s senior portfolio strategists.
Based on their outlook for the global
economy, the optimal portfolio
allocations are made between the
three major asset classes, sectors, and
geographic regions.
IT’S TIME FOR YOU TO LEARN
ABOUT UMA TECHNOLOGY:
ALEX BELAND

TYPICAL INVESTMENT ADVISOR
800 approximately
No Focus
Alex Béland focuses on a small number of accounts, which
allows him to provide personalized services that would
normally be found at a boutique advisory charging much
higher fees, with more limited technology.
Investment advisors typically have more than 800 clients to
manage at any one time, and cannot provide both technology
and personalized service due to this volume approach.
a UNIQUE APPROACH
For individuals and families who are dissatisfied with the performance of their
investment portfolio (and frustrated by managing multiple investment accounts),
Alex Béland is a
technology-assisted wealth management advisor.

9 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
And yet no one wants to blindly trust those managers either. Sure, they focus
on the markets 12 hours a day, have massive investment in software and
technology, and work in teams with sector focus. But we still want some
sense of control ourselves.
Today, the way to get this control is to use a techonology platform like A+.
(And as we have said many times, there are other good platforms, but we
happen to like ours the best.) THEN, overlay the technology platform with an
investment advisor like Alex Béland who specializes in working with medical
professionals. When you do it this way, you are managing your wealth with
technology AND the human touch.
If your wealth is being managed by an analogue investment firm, still utilizing
the same methods that failed in 2008, odds are your wealth is being exposed to
greater risk than you realize. The world economy is so large, tightly correlated
and market changes happen so quickly that no single advisor, no single firm can
do it all. Truth is, you can’t outthink, outmanage and outperform the best financial
analyst teams in the market.
TODAY, YOU HAVE TO HAVE ALL THREE.
HERE’S WHY:
WE AUTOMATICALLY apply the
Strategic Committee’s findings to
your A+ portfolio quarterly for
optimal asset allocation.
• AUTOMATIC
REBALANCING
• CONSOLIDATED
REPORTING
• PORTFOLIO
CUSTOMIZATION
• TAX
SENSITIVITY
YOU WILL RECEIVE an in-depth A+
Portfolio Monitor every quarter,
which details your asset mix,
portfolio performance, and stock
positions owned
MAINTAIN THE OPTIMAL level of
diversification specific to your goals
with greater precision
MINIMIZES OVERALL TAX impact on
the portfolio by coordinating the tax
consequences of trades in one
investment type with those of another
TECHNOLOGY
TECHNOLOGY and the HUMAN TOUCH
TOOLS
THIRD PARTY DUE diligence by the
Strategic Investment Research
Group to select world-class manag-
ers and investment vehicles.

• MANDATES
• RBC ISC
TO MEET A BROAD range of investor
objectives — long-term wealth
creation, income generation, and
capital preservation.

senior representatives, chief
investment officers, portfolio
strategists, economists, and
research analysts.

11 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
The SIRG manager evaluation process is comprehensive, structured, and executed by
specialized professionals.
The evaluation model examines quantitative and qualitative factors associated with
investment performance: the team’s talent, experience, and quality; the quality of
research and judgment; consistent, proven performance; demonstrated commitment to
ethical practices; and responsive client service.
You can research stocks and bonds quite easily on Google finance or any other online tool.
But researching investment managers is more difficult. A lot more difficult. In fact, even
with all the online research tools available, finding a great investment manager remains a
specialized field. Few know how to do it well.
To give you the benefits of this research, RBC has partnered with the Strategic
Investment Research Group (SIRG) at Prudential Investments LLC. Prudential is a
pioneer in investment manager research, having initiated coverage in 1976.
Today, Prudential is one of the first centralized research departments dedicated to
measuring investment manager performance.
With over 25,000 investment management firms registered worldwide, identifying the right ones to manage
your portfolio is clearly a difficult task. Often, investors select managers without the benefit of in-depth
analysis unaware that such analysis does in fact exist.
HOW SIRG SELECTS ELITE MANAGERS
MORE THAN 25,000 REGISTERED INVESTMENT MANAGERS
OF THOSE, ONLY 4,000 MINIMALLY QUALIFY
FROM THERE, WE SCREEN FOR CRITERIA TO MATCH YOUR
GOALS (ASSET CLASS, INVESTMENT STYLE, ETC.)
WE THEN DO 3 THINGS: QUANTITATIVE ANALYSIS,
QUALITATIVE ANALYSIS, AND A COMMITTEE REVIEW
ONLY THEN DO WE MAKE A RECOMMENDATION
FOR THE MANAGER QUALIFIED FOR YOU
A HIGH-STAKES BUSINESS
A+ PLATFORM DELIVERS
IT’S MORE THAN TECHNOLOGY — IT’S ACCESS TO ELITE MANAGERS
THE RESULT? YOU GET THE BEST MONEY MANAGERS IN THE WORLD
www.getwsodownload.com

12 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
WHAT HAPPENS NEXT?
DISCOVERY
Though everyone will say, “we have to do
discovery,” HOW it’s done is crucial. Alex
excels in making this process fast and easy.
FINANCIAL PLANNING
It’s easy to provide you with a computer-
modeled portfolio. What’s harder is a
customized analysis of your financial
situation incorporating your financial goals,
risk tolerance and long-range plans.
WILL & ESTATE REVIEW
Although you won’t be around to know if this
was done right, your legacy lives on through
your will. There’s almost nothing more
important, and as your advisor, Alex works
to get this right.
INSURANCE REVIEW
An insurance specialist needs to help you
protect everything you have worked to
build. When done with high proficiency you
will save taxes, decrease your overall risk,
and to protect what you worked for.
INVESTMENT POLICY STATEMENT (IPS)
You’ll want to see the blueprint for your investor profile,
and here’s where you’ll decide “this is for me.” If you don’t
like the blueprint, then you probably won’t like the whole
service, so this is the point to choose carefully.
INVESTMENT PROPOSAL
Before implementation, your objectives will be reviewed
together with Alex, the blueprint agreed on, and the next
year of financial management begins.
ONGOING SERVICES
You are apprised of the performance of your portfolio and
the markets through regular contact, updates, client events,
newsletters, and our website.
REGULAR REVIEWS
As your needs and the markets evolve, scheduled
reviews ensure that your plan remains an effective tool
in achieving your objectives.

13 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
FOR THOSE CONSIDERING RBC A+ TECHNOLOGY:
RBC Investment Strategy Committee (RISC)
RBC Global Asset Management
Prudential’s Quantitative Management
Associates (QMA)
There are six major sources of investment analysis and strategy that feed the A+
technology-driven decision system. The following analyst groups are part of the A+ decision
matrix, and it’s worth a few minutes to learn more about each. These are the foundation of
wealth management plans for over 1,000,000 Candians and international investors.
RBC DS Mutual Fund Research
RBC DS Portfolio Advisory Group
Prudential’s Strategic Investment
Research Group (SIRG)
And it’s not just size that matters, it’s depth and quality of decision
makers. RBC Dominion Securities has a team of 180 financial planning,
investment solution, legal, and taxation specialists, 42 investment models,
3,500 support personnel, 140 branches across Canada, and relationships
with over 150 exceptional portfolio managers across the world.
RBC Wealth Management directly serves high net worth and ultra high
net worth clients in Canada, the United States, Latin America, Europe,
the Middle East, Africa, and Asia with a full suite of private banking,
investment, trust, and other wealth management solutions.
Chartered in 1869, RBC (TSX:RY) is now Canada’s largest financial services company serving more than
12 million clients worldwide with $1.6 trillion in assets. RBC is the sixth-largest bank in North America
and ranked one of the world’s top 10 safest banks.
IF YOU LIKE ALEX BELAND
THEN YOU’RE REALLY GOING TO LIKE RBC DOMINION SECURITIES
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 16 --

14 THE OPPORTUNITY 	WHY NOW 	THE SOLUTION 	ALEX	HOW IT WORKS	THE PLATFORM
Things are so uncertain,
shouldn’t I just sit tight?
Will 2012 be any better
than 2011?
What about bonds?
How likely are panics?
How does the Chinese
economy factor in?
With the European crisis continuing to
ferment, I do not believe this is a time
to put investment portfolios on auto-
pilot. I continue to watch the progress
of reliable leading indicators, which
for the most part is consistent with
my base-case forecasts for the major
economies and corporate earnings.
What roll does the US
economy play for me?
Even though events in Europe could
dominate financial markets through
year end, the U.S. Congressional
calendar should not be overlooked.
Now that the super committee’s
work has concluded without a deal,
Congress may soon decide whether
to extend stimulus provisions that
are scheduled to expire at year end.
For the world’s largest economy
already muddling along at a slow
pace, these are not inconsequential
decisions. Allowing $112 billion
in payroll tax cuts to expire, for
example, could subtract 1% from
the 2012 GDP growth rate.
Even if Congress were to extend the
payroll tax cut and other provisions,
such as unemployment insurance
payments and capital spending
incentives, the economy would
still face headwinds from fiscal
tightening. Furthermore, businesses
and high-income taxpayers
remain in a fog of uncertainty
about potential longer-term,
comprehensive tax code changes.
Caution remains my mantra. I
recommend portfolios reflect
“Neutral” or benchmark exposure to
global equities and below-benchmark
exposure to fixed income. Eurozone
contagion risks and extreme fiscal
tightening, not just in Europe and the
U.K. but potentially now in the U.S.,
have obscured the corporate earnings
outlook for 2012. Analysts have not
sufficiently marked down earnings
estimates to reflect a more serious
Eurozone crisis or a U.S. recession.
In my opinion, the probabilities of
these occurring are sufficiently high
that they should be factored into the
investment equation.
How long will the
volatility persist?
Volatility will likely persist
for money-center and large
regional bank stocks until the
Eurozone banking sector begins
to stabilize.
It’s true. Since any credible
solution to Europe’s crisis—
assuming one eventually
materializes—may still take
months to surface, let alone
be approved and implemented,
there are likely more “flight-to-
safety” episodes ahead of us.
The Bank of England and the US
Federal Reserve appear ready
for additional large quantitative
easing efforts to keep long rates
low for an extended period.
The Chinese economy’s period
of adjustment has become more
painful as it has proceeded.
Tight monetary conditions to
bring down inflation and rein in
a property bubble are working.
But the resultant credit crunch is
taking a toll among manufacturers
already suffering because of
falling demand from their biggest
customer—Europe.
“Volatility will
likely persist.”
ALEX BELAND Investment advisor
Q&A with ALEX
THE INSIDER PERSPECTIVE
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 16 --

I was a paramedic for eight years,
and come from a family of physicians.
How much does that matter?
Quite a bit when you recognize that
today, almost anyone can be a great
wealth manager. The technologies
are so robust, it’s almost too easy.
In my case, SPECIALIZATION
brings most of the value. Because
of my unique background, I deeply
understand the needs of medical
professionals. - Alex Beland
